description_long: This is a modern, flat-roofed house with a geometric, multi-level design and clean, angular lines. The exterior is predominantly light gray with darker gray roofing, and there are several distinct roof sections at varying heights. The house is surrounded by a low boundary wall and features green lawn areas on at least two sides, suggesting private outdoor spaces. Windows are arranged asymmetrically, with some large horizontal panes and smaller vertical slits, contributing to a contemporary aesthetic. The main entryway is set into the front facade, protected by an overhang and adjacent to a garage door. The overall structure is compact yet expansive, with a focus on privacy and minimalism.
description: A modern, multi-level house with flat roofs, light gray walls, and asymmetrical windows, surrounded by a low wall and green lawns. The design emphasizes clean lines, privacy, and contemporary style.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, garage door, and a section of green lawn behind the boundary wall.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the layered roof structure and the long, uninterrupted wall with minimal window openings.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying additional green lawn space and a more private facade with fewer windows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view revealing the extended length of the house, multiple roof levels, and more green space within the boundary.
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed main door with an overhang, adjacent to a garage door, minimal decorative elements, and no visible porch or columns.
